prose.title: 38b mos
prose.body: The 38B MOS (Military Occupational Specialty) is a Civil Affairs Specialist in the U.S. Army. Civil Affairs Specialists act as a liaison between the military and civil authorities, local populations, and non-governmental organizations. They help plan and execute civil-military operations, conduct assessments, and provide support in areas such as governance, infrastructure, and public services. If you have any specific questions about the 38B MOS or need more information, feel free to ask!
